title: santalodes fraternum
intro: Santalodes fraternum, also known as the False Sandalwood, is a plant species native to tropical regions, characterized by its aromatic and woody properties. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Santalodes fraternum include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Santalodes fraternum can be found in essential oils, tinctures, and teas, which are often used in aromatherapy and natural remedies.
